author: refactor-ports
content: Plan: (1) Add ServerUrls frozen dataclass to utilities.py without dead url()/base_noscheme methods, fix os.chdir to directory= param, use port 0. (2) Update conftest.py server fixture to yield ServerUrls. (3) Convert test_simple_commands.py to use dynamic URLs via server fixture, including the missed test_get_with_popup_blocking. Keep old constants in utilities.py for backward compat with other test files.
